steps.name: src/llm/core/interface.py
steps.caption: Abstract LLMProvider base class (generate/list_models/validate_config) plus the LLMError exception hierarchy.

steps.name: Provider-agnostic LLM abstraction
steps.caption: Unified interface letting one codebase call Claude, OpenAI, Ollama, Astraflow, and Atlas backends interchangeably.

steps.name: Catalog counts disagree across docs
steps.caption: AGENTS.md claims 67 agents/271 skills/92 commands while SOUL.md says 30 agents/135 skills/60 commands.

steps.name: AGENTS.md
steps.caption: Agent instruction doc: 67 agents, 271 skills, 92 commands, core principles, orchestration, security, testing, and workflow policy.

steps.name: OpenAI-compatible endpoint reuse
steps.caption: Astraflow and Atlas reuse the OpenAI SDK chat-completions flow against alternate base URLs.

steps.name: OpenAI clients skip credential enforcement
steps.caption: OpenAI-compatible adapters pass _enforce_credentials=False so missing keys don't block client construction.

steps.name: src/llm/providers/openai.py
steps.caption: OpenAI adapter using chat.completions, parsing tool_calls and usage, with GPT-4o/3.5 model registry.
